description: Configure SLA Business Hours and Corporate Holidays in ManageEngine OpManager. A policy document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/sla_calendar_policy_2026.txt. Read this document, navigate to the Business Hours configuration area in OpManager, and create the two specified Business Hour profiles ('US-Trading-Hours' and 'APAC-Extended-Support') and the specified Holiday List ('Global-Corporate-Holidays-2026') with the exact names and parameters. Application credentials: admin/Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
